description: A technician is troubleshooting a control panel and needs the electrical schematic for the machine.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the equipment they are working on.

nodes.task_description: Search the technical document library for schematic diagrams related to that model.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds a list of documents, including the electrical schematic.

nodes.task_description: Open the schematic and zoom in on the specific circuit for the control panel.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully views the detailed wiring diagram needed for the repair.
